title: The Bacterium in Your Gums Has Been Found in Breast Tumors. Now We Know What It Does There.
description: A 2026 Johns Hopkins study didn't just find a common gum disease bacterium living inside breast tumors — it mapped exactly how it damages DNA, hijacks immune defenses, and makes chemotherapy fail. The mechanism is real. The causal question isn't settled. Here's what the evidence actually says.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for The Bacterium in Your Gums Has Been Found in Breast Tumors. Now We Know What It Does There.
